title: frivaldia volubilis
side_effects: Frivaldia volubilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils may also cause headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in extreme cases. Improper use of Frivaldia volubilis can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
